title: Rocket Lab Q4 2023 Earnings Preview
text: The consensus EPS estimate is -$0.07 and the consensus revenue estimate is $61.21 million, representing 18.2% year-over-year growth. Q4 2023 revenue is forecasted between $65 million and $69 million with GAAP gross margins of 24-26% and non-GAAP margins of 30-32%. 2023 is expected to see 11 launches and 2024 aims for 22, trending towards a $7.5 million average selling price. Key concerns include higher operating expenses due to continued investment in the Neutron program, expansion of its workforce, increased research and development spending, and higher IT costs, including enhanced cybersecurity requirements for U.S. government programs, which are likely to put pressure on operating margins. Rocket Lab USA (RKLB) reported earnings for Q4 2023 on February 27, 2024.
